subcodes.title: Words to Mr Wilhelm and others, spoken on 1912-11-15
subcodes.first_line: Education and training are the most important issues in the world of existence. Without an educator, little progress can be made in material affairs... The whole world is like a physical body and the power of Baha'u'llah may be regarded as the main artery in the body of existence.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در عالم وجود تعلیم و تربیت اهم امور است بدون معلم در امور مادی ترقی حاصل نشود تا چه رسد در امور روحانی
subcodes.subjects: @need for an educator, @education and the development of capacity, @education of children; moral education, @differences in human capacity, @spiritual transformation
